CustomField.formula: IF((Hour(SignOutTime__c) - Hour(SignInTime__c)) + (MINUTE(SignOutTime__c) - MINUTE(SignInTime__c))/60 >= 9 , (Hour(SignOutTime__c) - Hour(SignInTime__c)) + (MINUTE(SignOutTime__c) - MINUTE(SignInTime__c))/60 - 1 , IF((Hour(SignOutTime__c) - Hour(SignInTime__c)) + (MINUTE(SignOutTime__c) - MINUTE(SignInTime__c))/60 >=7,(Hour(SignOutTime__c) - Hour(SignInTime__c)) + (MINUTE(SignOutTime__c) - MINUTE(SignInTime__c))/60 -0.75 ,(Hour(SignOutTime__c) - Hour(SignInTime__c)) + (MINUTE(SignOutTime__c) - MINUTE(SignInTime__c))/60 ))
CustomField.label: 工作时间
